data.title: The Invisible Industry Protecting Trillions of Dollars in Global Infrastructure: Global Paints and Coatings Market to Reach USD 294.82 Billion by 2032 -- Says Maximize Market Research
data.description: In Pune, India, as of March 5, 2026, it has been highlighted that various structures like bridges, aircraft, automobiles, pipelines, and skyscrapers benefit from a crucial but often overlooked layer of protection. This layer plays a vital role in safeguarding these structures, such as offshore oil rigs in harsh marine conditions, and in prolonging the lifespan of bridges. The importance of this protection is evident across various industries, ensuring the durability and safety of key infrastructure.

data.title: Hexnode Launches Hexnode IdP: A Native Identity Layer for Seamless Enterprise Security
data.description: In San Francisco, Hexnode, a division of Mitsogo specializing in enterprise software, revealed the release of Hexnode IdP. This new native identity layer provides enterprise-level authentication and identity management in a unified framework. Functioning as a dedicated Identity Provider (IdP), this solution represents a notable advancement in the Hexnode ecosystem, serving as a comprehensive identity engine seamlessly integrated into the Hexnode UEM platform.

data.title: Rhoads & Rhoads PSC Secures $3.7 Million Settlement in Catastrophic Head-On Collision Case
data.description: In Owensboro, Kentucky, on March 5, 2026, Rhoads & Rhoads Injury Lawyers successfully obtained a settlement of $3.7 million for a 61-year-old construction worker. This individual sustained severe injuries in a head-on collision that took place on June 14, 2022, in Hancock County, Kentucky.

data.title: DoubleLine Foresees Convergence Between Emerging and Developed Sovereign Credits
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on March 5, 2026, it was reported that there is a potential convergence in market risk-pricing of local currency-denominated sovereign debt from significant emerging market (EM) nations with that of developed market (DM) sovereign debt. According to Bill Campbell, Portfolio Manager and Head of the Global Department, this convergence is expected to occur. The news suggests a significant shift in the risk evaluation of sovereign debt between EM and DM countries.

data.title: Natus expands availability to expert-level review of EEG with global launch of autoSCORE AI analysis tool
data.description: Middleton, Wisconsin - On March 5, 2026, Natus Medical Incorporated revealed the worldwide introduction of the autoSCORE™ analysis tool. This marks the release of the inaugural artificial intelligence model with the ability to automatically provide detailed clinical EEG interpretations. This groundbreaking advancement aims to enhance medical professionals' efficiency and accuracy in interpreting EEG results.

data.title: Xsolla Agency Launches to Empower Creators Across Entertainment-Based Intellectual Property
data.description: Xsolla, a worldwide leader in video game commerce, has introduced Xsolla Agency, a new service designed to connect game developers with high-quality entertainment-based intellectual property (IP). This innovative offering aims to assist game creators in overcoming key obstacles by providing access to premium IP, global monetization solutions, and essential operational support to establish thriving business ventures. Xsolla Agency streamlines the process of obtaining entertainment licenses for developers, addressing critical challenges within the industry.

data.title: Batteries Plus Named One of the SOCi100 Most Visible Local Enterprise Brands of 2026
data.description: HARTLAND, Wisconsin - Batteries Plus, the top battery and power solutions franchise in the nation, has been recognized for its online presence. Ranked at No. 14 on the Visibility List and No. 40 for AI discoverability, the company is making strides in the digital world. The announcement was made on March 5, 2026, by Batteries Plus. This achievement positions the franchise as a prominent player in the industry.

data.title: Third Annual Bio-IT World Venture, Innovation & Partnering Conference Returns to Boston May 19
data.description: A conference focusing on connecting capital, technology, and science to speed up drug discovery will take place in Boston on March 5, 2026. Organized by Cambridge Healthtech Institute, the third annual Bio-IT World Venture, Innovation & Partnering Conference will address the collaboration between various sectors involved in drug development. This event aims to accelerate the process by bringing together investors, technologists, and scientists.

data.title: Ecopetrol publishes chapter on social and environmental issues, including climate, for 2025
data.description: In Bogota, Colombia on March 5, 2026, Ecopetrol S.A. revealed compliance with External Circular 031 of 2021 from the Superintendency of Finance of Colombia by releasing its 2025 report on practices, policies, and processes. Traded as BVC: ECOPETROL and NYSE: EC, the company continues to uphold transparency with this latest disclosure.

data.title: Together AI Announces Business And Product Milestones At First AI Native Conference
data.description: A recent event in San Francisco on March 5, 2026, highlighted advancements in AI infrastructure, open source research, and reinforcement learning. Together AI, a leading AI Native Cloud provider for rapidly expanding AI firms, unveiled its inaugural AI Native Conf. This event was a platform to showcase innovative breakthroughs, with a focus on cutting-edge technology.
